n_2ee8e9d816.text: List parent dir before any delete to confirm exact filename and avoid ghost deletes.

r_6a24339bf4.text: If contact or account search returns no matches, return CLARIFICATION — never write to outbox without a file-sourced email.

n_a3c9b63c7e.text: 'Let's start over' scoped to cards/threads means bulk delete non-templates only — same as explicit bulk-delete phrasing.

a_21f7348880.text: Writing to /outbox/ before confirming both the recipient email (from contact file) and the next ID (from seq.json).
